productName: hashbreak - Pre Rolls (Infused) - White Cherry Truffle - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on White Cherry Truffle and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of tree fruit, rose, and diesel, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
